title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google's Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that orchestrates frontier models with unified access to over 30 scientific databases like UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. It accelerates research workflows from hypothesis to wet-lab experiments by coordinating models, literature, and data in multi-step tasks.
